name: Talisman Bundle
descs:
Whenever an ally deals 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 4 [Burst] Potency instead.

Whenever an ally deals 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 5 [Burst] Potency instead.

Whenever an ally deals 1+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 5 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count instead.
